posts.author: electriqseo (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can the team at Monday.com please PLEASE change the default workspace settings or give us the ability to switch this?

A new client’s workspace is ALWAYS the start for our many workspaces, but frankly, spending the time EVERY day switching it to our internal workspaces is that much time wasted. Please…it might even help with your expansion/acceptance & growth!
